name: Sean Jones
abstract: Sean Jones (born May 29, 1978 in Warren, Ohio) is an American trumpeter and composer featured on the 2007 Grammy Award-winning album Turned to Blue by Nancy Wilson. As a bandleader, Jones has released eight albums under the Mack Avenue Records label.

about_quotes.speaker: Jason Palmer
about_quotes.evidence: I think of people like Ambrose Akinmusire, Jonathan Finlayson, Sean Jones, Philip Dizak, Adam O’Farrill, you know those trumpet players they have that very unique, recognizable voice
about_quotes.doc_title: Jason Palmer interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, May 2, 2025

about_quotes.speaker: Reggie Watkins
about_quotes.evidence: I think it’s great when I think of people like Sean Jones you know, now going to Peabody.
about_quotes.doc_title: Reggie Watkins interviewed by Monk Rowe, Utica, New York, May 22, 2018
